plugins.name: wasp
plugins.description: Orchestrator for building a complete UOMI agent end-to-end. Guides through scaffold → Rust logic → test → build → deploy → backend.

plugins.name: wasp-create
plugins.description: Scaffold a new UOMI agent project using the official template.

plugins.name: wasp-agent
plugins.description: Write or modify the Rust WASM agent logic (lib.rs). Covers chat, structured I/O, RAG, multi-step patterns.

plugins.name: wasp-build
plugins.description: Compile the Rust agent to WASM and troubleshoot build errors.

plugins.name: wasp-dev
plugins.description: Test the agent locally with an interactive console or structured input files.

plugins.name: wasp-deploy
plugins.description: Deploy the WASM on-chain: IPFS upload and NFT mint via MetaMask UI. Supports new deploy and update of existing agent.

plugins.name: wasp-proxy
plugins.description: Build and deploy the Node.js backend that calls the on-chain agent via UomiWeb2ProxySdk.

plugins.name: wasp-call
plugins.description: Call an on-chain UOMI agent and read its output.

plugins.name: wasp-debug
plugins.description: Diagnose and fix errors across the full UOMI agent stack — Rust compilation, WASM runtime, LLM API, on-chain execution.
